<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 2:08 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
You need to expand the existing Cursor Skill at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\` to support 6 brand design style options. The skill currently has Shokz style only.

## STEP 1: Read all source materials

Read these files in order:

**Existing skill files (at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\`):**
- SKILL.md
- references/design-tokens.md
- references/component-library.md  
- references/copy-patterns.md
- references/page-structures.md

**Design pattern analysis files (at `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\`):**
- apple-design-patterns.md
- beats-design-patterns.md
- bose-design-patterns.md
- sony-design-patterns.md
- chinese-tech-design-patterns.md

**Excel competitive insights (at `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\`):**
- 竞品listing_full.md (read the first 200 lines for copy insights)

Also check if any Apple/Beats/Bose reference files were already created in the skill directory by a previous task.

## STEP 2: Create reference files for each NEW style

The 6 styles and their groupings:

| # | Style | Brands | Status |
|---|-------|--------|--------|
| 1 | **Shokz** | Shokz | Already done (existing files without prefix) |
| 2 | **Apple** | Apple + Samsung + Google + LG | Need to create |
| 3 | **Beats** | Beats + Marshall | Need to create |
| 4 | **Bose** | Bose + B&O + Jabra | Need to create |
| 5 | **Sony** | Sony | Need to create |
| 6 | **Chinese Tech** | OPPO + Huawei + Soundcore + Oladance + Cleer | Need to create |

For styles 2-6, create these files (if not already created by a prior task):

**For each style, create 4 reference files:**
- `references/{style}-design-tokens.md` — CSS variables, colors, typography, spacing, border-radius
- `references/{style}-components.md` — HTML+CSS component snippets
- `references/{style}-copy-patterns.md` — Headline formulas, body text rules, CTA wording, copy insights from the Excel
- `references/{style}-page-structures.md` — Section templates

**For each style, create 1 skeleton file:**
- `assets/{style}-product-page-skeleton.html` — Complete standalone HTML skeleton

Style-specific notes from the analysis:

### Apple Style
- White-dominant (#f5f5f7 off-white backgrounds), deep black (#1d1d1f) sections for contrast
- System font: -apple-system, SF Pro Display
- Hero: MASSIVE headlines (56-96px), centered, minimal text
- CTAs: Blue link-style (#0066CC) "Learn more >" + "Buy >"
- Alternating light/dark sections
- No inline purchase area on marketing pages (separate /shop/ pages)
- Copy: aspirational, fragment sentences ("Pro. Beyond." / "Listening. Remastered.")
- Marketing page + Buy page (two skeletons needed: apple-marketing-skeleton.html + apple-buy-skeleton.html)

### Beats Style
- Dark/black backgrounds dominant, product color as accent
- Bold high-contrast typography, likely Tungsten/Impact-style for headlines
- Inline purchase area at top (not separate page)
- Data callout blocks with HUGE numbers
- Copy: street/culture tone, casual ("Stays locked in" / "Clutch call quality")
- Combined page (one skeleton: beats-product-page-skeleton.html)

### Bose Style
- Extreme restraint: black/white/gray
- Sticky purchase bar that follows scroll
- "Sandwich" structure: purchase → storytelling (zero CTAs) → purchase
- Sensory second-person copy ("A hug for your ears")
- BoseCare warranty upsell
- Combined page (one skeleton: bose-product-page-skeleton.html)

### Sony Style
- 80%+ dark backgrounds (#000000, #1a1a1a)
- SST font (use system fallback: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif)
- Feature Badges horizontal scrolling bar
- Three-layer tech narrative: emotional hook → technical substance → quantified comparison
- Heavy use of media quotes and engineer testimonials
- Separate purchase page + marketing page (two skeletons needed)

### Chinese Tech Style
- Dark immersive hero with floating product render
- Giant data callouts (biggest numbers of any style)
- One-feature-per-full-screen layout
- Tech version numbering / branded terminology
- Explicit generational comparison with predecessors
- Engineering narrative priority
- Extensive footnotes (15-18 per page)
- Combined page (one skeleton: chinese-tech-product-page-skeleton.html)

## STEP 3: Update SKILL.md

Rewrite SKILL.md to:
1. Add "Step 0: Style Selection" at the very beginning of the workflow
2. Present a clear comparison table of all 6 styles
3. Keep the existing Shokz workflow content (original reference files without prefix are Shokz)
4. Add a complete reference file index mapping each style to its files
5. Keep SKILL.md under 500 lines total - use progressive disclosure

## STEP 4: Merge Excel copy insights

The Excel file (竞品listing_full.md) contains copywriting insights for many brands. Merge relevant insights:
- Apple insights → apple-copy-patterns.md
- Beats insights → beats-copy-patterns.md  
- Bose insights → bose-copy-patterns.md
- Sony insights → sony-copy-patterns.md
- OPPO/Huawei/Soundcore/Oladance insights → chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md

Key Excel insights to integrate (examples):
- OPPO: sensory copy writing ("震撼你的DNA", "听见歌手呼吸"), tech + emotion combo
- Huawei: heavy use of quantified data ("传输效率提升4倍"), tech pillar structure
- Bose: "不重点强调技术参数原理，重点宣传效果（沉浸）", sensory descriptions
- Apple: "不单介绍某一项升级，各项间的协同创新也是亮点"
- Sony: "源自索尼Walkman工艺" (heritage narrative)

## IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS

- SKILL.md must stay under 500 lines
- Keep ALL existing Shokz files UNCHANGED (references without prefix = Shokz)
- Each reference file should be self-contained, following the quality/format of existing Shokz files
- Skeleton HTML files must be complete standalone single-file pages with inline CSS
- Use forward slashes for paths in markdown
- This is a large task - you may use internal subagents to parallelize the work (e.g., one per style)

## File naming convention
- references/apple-design-tokens.md, references/apple-components.md, etc.
- references/beats-design-tokens.md, references/beats-components.md, etc.
- references/bose-design-tokens.md, references/bose-components.md, etc.
- references/sony-design-tokens.md, references/sony-components.md, etc.
- references/chinese-tech-design-tokens.md, references/chinese-tech-components.md, etc.
- assets/apple-marketing-skeleton.html, assets/apple-buy-skeleton.html
- assets/beats-product-page-skeleton.html
- assets/bose-product-page-skeleton.html
- assets/sony-marketing-skeleton.html, assets/sony-buy-skeleton.html
- assets/chinese-tech-product-page-skeleton.html
</user_query>

input.prompt:
You need to create 6 files for the "Sony" brand design style in a Cursor Skill located at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\`. These files define how to generate product pages in Sony's design language.

## Source Material: Sony Design Patterns

Key characteristics from the analysis:
- **Colors**: 80%+ dark backgrounds (#000000, #1a1a1a). White (#FFFFFF) for specs/purchase areas. Light gray (#F5F5F5) for Benefits Bar. CTA buttons: black fill white text. Links: #0070D2 blue. Promo: red for "Save $XX".
- **Typography**: SST font (fallback: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif). Hero H1: 48-64px Bold. H2: 32-40px Bold. H3: 24-28px Bold. Body: 16-18px Regular. Price: 28-36px Bold. Caption/Badge: 12-14px. Stat numbers: 48-96px Bold.
- **Layout**: Marketing page + Buy page separation. Marketing: full-screen immersive sections, centered text + bottom product image. Buy: left image gallery + right purchase panel. Feature Badges horizontal scrolling bar.
- **Page structure**: Marketing page = Hero → 3D Explorer → NC deep dive → Sound deep dive → Call quality → Comfort → Connectivity → Promo Tiles. Buy page = Purchase panel → Feature Badges → Benefits Bar → Offers → About → Features → Reviews → FAQ → Footnotes.
- **Copy style**: Three-layer tech narrative: emotional hook → technical substance → quantified comparison. Heavy media quotes. Engineer testimonials with artist credits. "Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound." style headlines. Sentence-period fragments.
- **Unique elements**: Feature Badges horizontal scrollbar, media review quotes block, engineer testimonials, three-layer tech narrative, 30+ footnotes, separate marketing/buy pages.
- **CTA**: "ADD TO CART" (not Buy Now), "Learn More", "See More Features", "Where To Buy"
- **Border radius**: ~6px for buttons (not capsule like Apple/Shokz), 18px for cards
- **Section spacing**: 80-120px between sections. Max-width: ~1200px content, full-bleed images.
- **Responsive breakpoints**: @media (max-width: 1068px) tablet, @media (max-width: 734px) mobile

## Format Reference

Follow the format of the existing Shokz files. Each reference file should be self-contained markdown with:
- Clear section headers
- CSS code blocks where relevant
- HTML component snippets where relevant
- Tables for structured data
- Practical, copy-paste-ready code

## Files to Create

### 1. `references/sony-design-tokens.md`
Create a design tokens file with:
- CSS variables in `:root {}` block (colors, typography, layout, spacing, border-radius)
- Typography scale table (H1-Body-Caption-Stat with font-size, weight, line-height)
- Border radius table
- Spacing table
- Responsive breakpoint code
- Color usage rules
Key colors: --color-bg-primary: #000; --color-bg-secondary: #1a1a1a; --color-bg-light: #f5f5f5; --color-bg-white: #fff; --color-text-primary: #fff (on dark); --color-text-secondary: #999; --color-text-dark: #1a1a1a (on light); --color-accent-blue: #0070D2; --color-promo-red: #e74c3c; --color-border: #333;
Font: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif (SST fallback)
Max-width: 1200px content, section-padding: 100px 0, grid-gap: 60px

### 2. `references/sony-components.md`
Create component library with HTML+CSS snippets for:
1. Hero-Marketing (full-screen dark, centered headline + subtitle + product image)
2. Hero-Purchase (left image gallery + right purchase panel with price, color selector, ADD TO CART)
3. Feature-Badges-Bar (horizontal scrolling badges with icon + text)
4. Media-Reviews-Block (3 quote cards: "quote" — Source, Year)
5. Feature-Section-Dark (full-width dark section with centered H2 + body + product image)
6. Feature-Section-Split (50/50 left-text-right-image with dark background)
7. Tech-Three-Layer (emotional hook H2 → technical H3 + body → quantified comparison stat)
8. Engineer-Testimonial (blockquote + name + studio + artist credits list)
9. Benefits-Bar (horizontal: Easy Returns / My Sony / Free Shipping / 0% APR / 5% Back)
10. Spec-Table (key-value pairs grouped: Size & Weight / General / Battery / Bluetooth / NC)
11. Compare-Table (3-column with product images, "Learn More" CTA per column)
12. Footnotes (30+ numbered footnotes in small text)
Each with complete HTML + CSS.

### 3. `references/sony-copy-patterns.md`
Create copy patterns file covering:
- Product name format (型号 + 定位词 + 品类: "WH-1000XM6 Best Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones")
- Hero headline formulas: short-sentence-pair ("Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound."), full-caps declarations ("YOUR WORLD. NOTHING ELSE."), number+verb ("7x faster. Flawless control.")
- Three-layer tech narrative structure: Layer 1 = emotional hook / Layer 2 = technical substance / Layer 3 = quantified comparison with named predecessor
- Body text rules: second-person, verb-driven, em-dash explanations, "so" causation
- Media review quote format: "Quote." — Source, Year
- Engineer testimonial format: Name / Studio / (Artist credits) / "Quote"
- CTA wording: ADD TO CART, Learn More, See More, Where To Buy, Explore the 1000X series
- Feature Badge text examples
- Stat card display rules
- Footnote conventions (30+ numbered, each with test conditions)
- Forbidden words / tone rules
Include specific copy examples from the analysis.

### 4. `references/sony-page-structures.md`
Create page structures for TWO page types:
**A. Marketing Page (sony.com style)**:
- Hero (full-screen dark, centered title + subtitle + product image + video slideshow link)
- 3D Product Explorer (optional, XM6-level products)
- Deep-Dive sections x4-6 (NC, Sound, Calls, Comfort, Connectivity, etc.)
- Each deep-dive: H2 emotional title → H3 technical subtitle → body → optional stat/comparison
- Promo Tiles (cross-sell to series/category)
- Support links
- Footnotes
Section selection matrix by product tier.

**B. Buy Page (electronics.sony.com style)**:
- Purchase Panel (product name, price, Affirm financing, color selector, ADD TO CART)
- Tab Navigation (About / Features / Specs / Reviews / Questions / Support / Warranty)
- Feature Badges horizontal bar
- Benefits Bar
- Offers (trade-in, trials)
- About This Item (3 bullet summary)
- Features (embedded marketing content with media reviews)
- Reviews & Questions
- Return Policy
- Frequently Bought Together
- Footnotes

### 5. `assets/sony-marketing-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Dark theme dominant (80%+ dark sections)
- Placeholder content with [Image: description] and [Video: description]
- Complete responsive design (@media max-width: 1068px and 734px)
- Sections: Hero → Feature Overview → Deep-Dive NC → Deep-Dive Sound → Deep-Dive Calls → Deep-Dive Comfort → Connectivity → Promo Tiles → Footnotes
- Sony-style typography and spacing
- Media review quotes block
- Engineer testimonial
- Should be openable directly in browser

### 6. `assets/sony-buy-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Mixed light (purchase area) + dark (features) sections
- Tab navigation bar
- Left image + right purchase panel layout
- Feature Badges horizontal scrollbar
- Benefits Bar
- About section with "See More" expand
- Features section (dark, marketing content embedded)
- Spec table (key-value grouped)
- Reviews placeholder
- Footnotes (30+ numbered)
- Responsive design
- Should be openable directly in browser

IMPORTANT: Create ALL 6 files. Make them high quality and self-contained. Use forward slashes in markdown link paths.

input.description: Create Chinese Tech style reference files
input.prompt:
You need to create 5 files for the "Chinese Tech" brand design style in a Cursor Skill located at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\`. This style represents OPPO, Huawei, Soundcore, Oladance, and Cleer brands.

## Source Material: Chinese Tech Design Patterns

Key characteristics:
- **Colors**: Dark immersive backgrounds (#000, #111, #1a1a1a) throughout. White text for titles, light gray (#999, #bbb) for body. Minimal accent colors — product color is the only color variable. Occasional gradient light effects (Soundcore). CTA buttons vary by brand (brand color or black fill).
- **Typography**: System sans-serif fonts. Hero H1: 48-72px Bold. Data Callout numbers: 64-120px Extra Bold (THE largest of any style). H2: 36-48px. H3: 24-32px. Body: 16-18px light gray. Caption/Footnote: 12-14px.
- **Layout**: One-feature-per-full-screen (Feature-per-Screen). Average 12-18 sections per page. Giant data callouts as visual anchors. Combined marketing+purchase page (Soundcore style) or separate marketing/buy (Huawei/Oladance style).
- **Page structure**: Hero (dark + floating product render) → Core Tech 1 → Core Tech 2 → Core Tech 3 → ANC → Calls → Design → Battery → Connectivity → App → Compare Table → FAQ → Footnotes (15-18 per page).
- **Copy style**: Engineering narrative priority. Tech version numbering (Pure Voice 2.0, Intelligent ANC 3.0). Explicit generational comparison with predecessors. Self-created branded terminology. Mix of technical depth + sensory language. OPPO: "震撼你的DNA", "听见歌手呼吸". Huawei: "传输效率提升4倍".
- **Unique elements**: Giant data callouts (biggest numbers), one-feature-per-screen, tech versioning, predecessor comparison, extensive footnotes (15-18), certification/collaboration logo displays, brand philosophy blocks.
- **CTA**: Varies — "Buy Now" (Huawei), "Add to Cart" (Soundcore), "Watch the Film" (OPPO), dual CTA "Buy Now + Learn More" (Oladance)
- **Border radius**: 12-20px for cards, 30-40px for CTA buttons (varies by brand)
- **Section spacing**: 80-120px between sections. Each feature section designed for full viewport height.

## Format Reference

Follow the format of the existing Shokz reference files in the same directory. Each file should be self-contained markdown with clear headers, CSS code blocks, HTML snippets, tables, and copy-paste-ready code.

## Files to Create

### 1. `references/chinese-tech-design-tokens.md`
CSS variables in `:root {}`:
- Colors: --bg-primary: #000; --bg-secondary: #111; --bg-tertiary: #1a1a1a; --text-primary: #fff; --text-secondary: #999; --text-body: #bbb; --accent-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); --cta-primary: #1a1a1a; --cta-text: #fff; --border: #333; --footnote: #666;
- Typography: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
- Layout: max-width: 1200px; section-padding: 100px 0; section-min-height: 100vh (viewport-height sections)
- Data callout numbers: font-size: clamp(64px, 10vw, 120px); font-weight: 800
- Responsive: @media (max-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 768px)

Typography scale, border radius, spacing tables. Color usage rules. Responsive breakpoint code.

### 2. `references/chinese-tech-components.md`
HTML+CSS snippets for:
1. Hero-Immersive (full-viewport dark, floating product render center, title + tech pills bar + CTA)
2. Tech-Pills-Bar (horizontal badges: "LHDC 4.0 / Bone Mic / Dual Driver / ANC / Dynaudio" style)
3. Data-Callout-Panel (giant numbers grid: "2x / +67% / +80% / 96kHz" with labels and comparison baselines)
4. Feature-Full-Screen (one feature per viewport: H2 title + body + data callout + product image, dark bg)
5. Feature-Split-Dark (50/50 text + image on dark background)
6. Predecessor-Comparison (side-by-side bars: "vs [Previous Model]" with percentage improvement bars)
7. Tech-Version-Badge ("Pure Voice 2.0" / "ANC 3.0" styled badges)
8. Certification-Logos-Bar (Hi-Res / LDAC / Dynaudio / Red Dot Award logos row)
9. Battery-Callout (large hours number + fast-charge equation: "10 min = 4 hrs")
10. Brand-Philosophy-Block (3-pillar brand values: Connection / Singularity / Human Centric)
11. Compare-Table (self-family comparison, 4-6 columns)
12. FAQ-Accordion (expandable Q&A)
13. Footnotes-Block (15-18 numbered footnotes, very detailed)
Each with complete HTML + CSS.

### 3. `references/chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md`
Copy patterns covering:
- Headline formulas: [Tech Name] + [Sensory Promise] ("Ultralight Diaphragms Immerse You in Deep Bass"), version-numbered tech names ("Intelligent ANC 3.0"), sensory short phrases ("Hear Beyond Sensation")
- Data callout writing: comparison type (2x vs previous gen), absolute type (98.5%), conversion type (50H = 1,000 songs, 10min = 4hrs)
- Body text rules: engineering narrative priority, first-person plural for R&D ("We have re-optimized..."), precise material specs (0.0095mm, 0.033mm), tech-then-benefit structure
- Tech version naming convention: [Brand Term] [Version Number] (Pure Voice 2.0, Adaptive ANC 2.0)
- Predecessor comparison format: "比 [Previous Model] 提升 XX%" / "XX% improvement over [Previous Model]"
- Certification/collaboration mentions: where and how to display Hi-Res, LDAC, Dynaudio, etc.
- CTA wording variations by sub-brand
- Footnote format: numbered superscript in text, detailed test conditions at bottom
- Tone: confident engineering authority, mix of Chinese sensory writing ("震撼你的DNA") with Western technical precision
Include specific examples from OPPO, Huawei, Soundcore, Oladance.

### 4. `references/chinese-tech-page-structures.md`
Single combined page type (marketing + optional purchase at top):
- Optional Purchase Bar (price + color selector + Add to Cart — Soundcore style)
- Hero (full-viewport dark + floating product + tech pills)
- Core Feature sections x 3-5 (each full-viewport, one feature per screen)
- Data Comparison Panel (vs predecessor, 4-6 metrics)
- Secondary features x 3-5 (can be condensed)
- Design/Materials section
- Battery section (giant hours + fast charge equation)
- Connectivity/App section
- Certification bar
- Compare Table (self-family, 4-6 products)
- FAQ accordion
- Footnotes (15-18 items)

Section selection matrix by product tier (flagship vs mid vs entry).
Deep-dive section ordering rules.

### 5. `assets/chinese-tech-product-page-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Full dark theme throughout
- Each feature section designed for min-height: 100vh (viewport-filling)
- Giant data callout numbers (64-120px)
- Tech pills bar in hero
- Predecessor comparison section with visual bars
- Certification logos bar
- Battery callout with fast-charge equation
- FAQ accordion with JS toggle
- 15+ numbered footnotes
- Full responsive design (@media 1024px and 768px)
- Placeholder content with [Image: description]
- Should be openable directly in browser

IMPORTANT: Create ALL 5 files. Make them production-quality and self-contained. Use forward slashes in markdown paths.

input.description: Merge Excel copy insights into style copy-patterns
input.prompt:
You need to merge copywriting insights from a competitive Excel analysis into the copy-patterns.md files for Apple, Beats, and Bose styles in a Cursor Skill at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\references\`.

The Sony and Chinese Tech copy-patterns files are being created by another agent and will already include Excel insights, so only Apple, Beats, and Bose need updating.

## Excel Insights to Merge

Here are the key insights extracted from the competitive listing analysis Excel (竞品listing_full.md):

### Apple Insights (→ apple-copy-patterns.md)
- "不单介绍某一项升级，各项间的协同创新也是亮点" — Apple emphasizes synergy between features, not isolated upgrades
- H2 chip copy: "沉浸感拉满" — immersion-centric language
- "定制的驱动单元和放大器配合H2 芯片" — always describe how components work together
- Adaptive EQ: "让音乐为你量耳定制" — personalization narrative
- Spatial Audio: "置身于专为你个人开放的音乐厅" — personal concert hall metaphor
- Samsung Galaxy Buds copy pattern: "Samsung Galaxy AI" chip-first narrative (similar to Apple's H2 approach)
- LG Tone Free: Meridian partnership + graphene material narrative (similar to Apple's component storytelling)
- Google Pixel Buds Pro 2: "45 million data points from different ears" — massive data for comfort claims

### Beats Insights (→ beats-copy-patterns.md)
- Studio Pro CN: "标志性音质" (Iconic Sound) — brand heritage in copy
- "高达80%减少失真" — lead with dramatic percentage improvement
- Spatial Audio: "如同64个扬声器环绕四周" — vivid analogy for immersion
- "发烧友常用形容音质的词汇：无失真，均衡，高保真，解析力好，无音染" — audiophile vocabulary reference
- Solo Buds: "每个设计决策都专注于准确重现音乐" — design-intention narrative
- Powerbeats Pro: sport-first copy with movement verbs
- Beats uses "从设计决策上体现新产品对音质的重视" — copy that reveals design philosophy
- "音质卖点可以通过更多描述具体场景来增强消费者的感知：观影，游戏等" — scene-specific sound quality copy

### Bose Insights (→ bose-copy-patterns.md)
- "不重点强调技术参数原理，重点宣传效果（沉浸）" — effect over specs philosophy
- "你听到的音乐就在眼前，你几乎感觉自己根本没有配载耳机" — invisible technology narrative
- "这是一种开创性的体验，声音如此真实，让你几乎忍不住想要尝试伸出手去触摸它" — synesthesia/cross-sensory copy
- CustomTune: "通过三个步骤定制声音" — step-by-step personalization narrative
- Ultra Open Earbuds: "音乐不停，畅听一切" — never-stop-your-music positioning
- "开放式音频技术则让你能够聆听专属于你的高质量声音" — private + high-quality paradox
- Bose US adds third-party review quotes at top of page (CN doesn't) — regional copy strategy difference
- "通过提高参与感（三个步骤定制声音）来增强对产品卖点的认同" — engagement-driven persuasion
- Jabra (Bose group brand) insights: "62,000 挑一的完美贴合" — massive sample size for fit claims; "云感舒适" — cloud comfort metaphor

## Instructions

For each of the 3 files:
1. First READ the existing file at the path
2. Add a NEW section at the end called "## Competitive Copy Insights" (or similar heading that fits)
3. Include the relevant insights above, organized by theme (sound quality, comfort, spatial audio, personalization, etc.)
4. Format each insight as actionable guidance: what the insight is + how to apply it
5. Keep the existing content UNCHANGED — only ADD the new section
6. Do NOT rewrite or restructure the existing content

File paths:
- `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\references\apple-copy-patterns.md`
- `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\references\beats-copy-patterns.md`
- `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\references\bose-copy-patterns.md`

content.text:
Three subagents dispatched in parallel. While they work, let me start writing the updated SKILL.md.

Good, 3 subagents are running in parallel:
1. Sony style files
2. Chinese Tech style files
3. Excel merge into Apple/Beats/Bose copy-patterns

While they run, let me start on the SKILL.md update. This is the critical coordination piece. I need to:
1. Rewrite SKILL.md to add "Step 0: Style Selection"
2. Present a 6-style comparison table
3. Keep existing Shokz workflow content
4. Add reference file index mapping
5. Keep under 500 lines

Let me draft the new SKILL.md now.

input.contents:
---
name: dante-website-product-ui
description: >-
  生成 6 种品牌设计风格的产品官网 HTML 页面。支持 Shokz / Apple / Beats / Bose / Sony / Chinese Tech 风格，覆盖产品详情页和购买页两种页面类型。输出单 HTML 文件，含完整 CSS，可直接浏览器打开。当用户提到"做产品页"、"做 listing page"、"做购买页"、"做官网页面"、"product page"、"listing page"，或要制作产品 HTML 展示页面时使用。不适用于 PPT（走 dante-shokz-ppt）、邮件/EDM、App 界面。
---

# 产品官网页面制作（6 种品牌风格）

> 把用户提供的产品资料拼装成一份指定品牌风格的单 HTML 页面。

---

## 0. 风格选择（必须第一步完成）

问用户目标风格，或根据产品品牌/定位推荐：

| # | 风格 | 代表品牌 | 视觉调性 | 文案调性 | 页面类型 |
|---|------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 1 | **Shokz** | Shokz | 黑白灰主调，品牌橙点缀 | 技术短句 + 价值句，克制 | 详情页 + 购买页（分离） |
| 2 | **Apple** | Apple / Samsung / Google / LG | 白底 #f5f5f7 为主，深黑段交替 | 诗意双关 + 文字游戏，无感叹号 | 营销页 + 购买页（分离） |
| 3 | **Beats** | Beats / Marshall | 深色主导，高对比，产品色强调 | 街头自信，口语化短句 | 合体页（购买+营销一体） |
| 4 | **Bose** | Bose / B&O / Jabra | 极简黑白灰，感官温暖 | 第二人称感官词，效果优先于参数 | 合体页 + sticky 购买条 |
| 5 | **Sony** | Sony | 80%+ 深色段，tech premium | 三层叙事：情感→技术→量化对比 | 营销页 + 购买页（分离） |
| 6 | **Chinese Tech** | OPPO / Huawei / Soundcore / Oladance / Cleer | 全暗沉浸，巨型数据 callout | 工程叙事 + 版本号体系，密集脚注 | 合体页（一功能一全屏） |

**选择后**，读取该风格对应的参考文件（见 §8 索引），按下方工作流执行。

---

## 1. 触发与边界

### 适用

- 用户要做某品牌风格的产品 HTML 页面
- 用户提到具体产品名并要求做页面
- 用户说"按 XX 风格做"、"做个 listing"、"做产品页"

### 不适用

- PPT / 演示文稿 → `dante-shokz-ppt`
- 邮件 / EDM → 通用 skill
- App 界面 / 小程序 → 通用 frontend skill

---

## 2. 工作流（6 步）

### Step 0 · 确认风格

从 §0 表格中选定风格。用户未指定时：
- Shokz 产品 → 默认 Shokz 风格
- 用户说"Apple 风格"/"像苹果官网" → Apple
- 运动/潮流产品 → 推荐 Beats
- 高端音频/静谧定位 → 推荐 Bose
- 日系科技 → Sony
- 中国品牌/参数密集 → Chinese Tech

### Step 1 · 确认页面类型

每个风格支持的页面类型不同（见 §0 表格）。问用户需要哪种：

| 风格 | 详情/营销页 | 购买页 | 合体页 |
|------|:---------:|:-----:|:-----:|
| Shokz | ✓ | ✓ | — |
| Apple | ✓ | ✓ | — |
| Beats | — | — | ✓ |
| Bose | — | — | ✓ |
| Sony | ✓ | ✓ | — |
| Chinese Tech | — | — | ✓ |

### Step 2 · 收集输入

需要以下资料（至少一项）：

1. **Message House**（.md）— 产品定位、核心/辅助卖点、竞品对标
2. **FABE 卖点体系**（.md）— 每个卖点的 Feature / Advantage / Benefit / Evidence
3. **官网文案表**（Excel 同步的 .md）— 每个 section 的定稿文案
4. **SPEC 规格书** — 技术参数、续航数据、防水等级

如果用户只给 brief，先帮他整理成结构化的卖点列表，确认后再做页面。

### Step 3 · 拼装页面

1. 读取对应风格的骨架 HTML（从 `assets/` 目录复制）
2. 读取 `{style}-page-structures.md` 确认 section 选配
3. 读取 `{style}-design-tokens.md` 确认颜色/字体/间距
4. 读取 `{style}-components.md` 选取需要的组件
5. 读取 `{style}-copy-patterns.md` 确认文案写法
6. 逐 section 填入内容，图片用描述性占位符 `[Image: 描述]`

### Step 4 · Section 选配

根据产品层级决定 deep-dive section 数量。各风格有不同的 section 数量基准：

| 层级 | Shokz | Apple | Beats | Bose | Sony | Chinese Tech |
|------|:-----:|:-----:|:-----:|:----:|:----:|:------------:|
| 旗舰 | 12-15 | 10-12 | 12-14 | 10-14 | 10-12 | 15-20 |
| 中端 | 8-12 | 8-10 | 9-11 | 7-9 | 8-10 | 12-15 |
| 入门 | 5-8 | 6-8 | 6-8 | 5-7 | 6-8 | 8-12 |

具体 section 选配规则见各风格的 `page-structures.md`。

### Step 5 · 自检

**通用检查项**（所有风格）：

- [ ] CSS 变量只用对应 `design-tokens.md` 定义的值
- [ ] 所有实验室数据带标注（`*` 或上标数字）
- [ ] Footnotes 区包含所有标注对应的免责声明
- [ ] 响应式断点生效
- [ ] 文件可独立在浏览器打开

**风格专属检查项**：

| 风格 | 额外检查 |
|------|---------|
| Shokz | 产品名全大写；headline 符合"短句+句号+价值句"；CTA 按钮胶囊型 30px 圆角 |
| Apple | Hero 区无 CTA 按钮；正文 max-width ≤700px 居中；深浅段交替；链接蓝 #0066CC |
| Beats | 购买区在首屏内联；"ADD TO BAG" 全大写；数据大字报带对比基准 |
| Bose | Sticky 购买条存在；叙事区块零 CTA；BoseCare 加购选项；感官词密集 |
| Sony | Feature Badges 横排；媒体评价引用块；三层技术叙事完整；30+ 脚注 |
| Chinese Tech | 巨型数字 callout（64-120px）；版本号术语完整；与上代显性对比；15+ 脚注 |

---

## 3. 各风格核心设计规则速查

### Shokz

- **颜色**：黑白灰主调，品牌橙 `#e8491d` 仅做 badge 点缀
- **间距**：Section padding 80px，双栏 gap 60px，CTA 圆角 30px
- **图文交替**：奇数文左图右，偶数图左文右
- **CTA**：黑底白字胶囊按钮（Shop Now / Add to Cart）

### Apple

- **颜色**：白底 `#f5f5f7` + 深黑 `#1d1d1f` 段交替，链接蓝 `#0066CC`/`#2997ff`
- **字号**：Display 64-96px，正文 max-width 700px 居中
- **CTA**：蓝色文字链 "Learn more >" + "Buy"，Hero 区无按钮

### Beats

- **颜色**：深色背景主导，产品色作强调色
- **购买区**：内联首屏，"ADD TO BAG" 全大写
- **数据大字报**：每个核心卖点配一个数字锚点，必带对比基准

### Bose

- **颜色**：极简黑白灰，无品牌强调色
- **结构**：三明治——购买 → 叙事（零 CTA）→ 购买
- **购买条**：Sticky 底部条贯穿全程；BoseCare 保修加购

### Sony

- **颜色**：80%+ 深色段，仅 Specs/购买面板用白底
- **Feature Badges**：横向滚动徽章栏，8-10 个卖点
- **叙事**：三层——情感钩子 → 技术实体 → 量化对比（点名前代型号）

### Chinese Tech

- **颜色**：全暗沉浸，产品本身是唯一色彩来源
- **数字**：巨型 callout（64-120px），对比型/绝对型/换算型
- **结构**：一功能一全屏，平均 12-18 sections
- **术语**：技术版本号体系 + 大量自创品牌术语

---

## 4. 文案硬规则（按风格）

### Shokz Headline

`[特性短语]. [价值短句].` — "Open-Ear Audio. Reimagined."

### Apple Headline

文字游戏必备（双关/押韵/引用）— "Unmake some noise." / "Charges fast. And lasts."

### Beats Headline

反差对比 + 口语化 — "Looks tiny. Sounds huge." / "Apple or Android? Yes."

### Bose Headline

感官祈使句 — "Sink deeper into sound" / "A hug for your ears"

### Sony Headline

短句宣言对 — "Beyond quiet. Transcendent sound." / "7x faster. Flawless control."

### Chinese Tech Headline

技术名 + 感性承诺 — "Ultralight Diaphragms Immerse You in Deep Bass"

**通用禁用词**：不用感叹号（Bose 偶尔例外），不用 "revolutionary"（用 "reimagined"），数据不用 "approximately"（用 "up to" + footnote）。

---

## 5. 购买元素差异

| 维度 | Shokz | Apple | Beats | Bose | Sony | Chinese Tech |
|------|-------|-------|-------|------|------|-------------|
| 主 CTA | Add to Cart | Buy | ADD TO BAG | Add to Cart | ADD TO CART | Buy Now / Add to Cart |
| 价格位置 | Hero 面板 | 产品卡片 | Hero 面板 | Hero 面板 | 购买面板 | Hero 或顶部 |
| 色彩选择 | 色块 swatch | 色块圆点 | 色板 swatch | 色块 swatch | 色块+标签 | 色块 swatch |
| 保修加购 | — | — | — | BoseCare 3 档 | — | — |
| 分期信息 | — | 月供 + 分期 | — | Afterpay | Affirm 0% APR | — |

---

## 6. 对比表策略

| 风格 | 对比策略 | 列数 |
|------|---------|------|
| Shokz | 本品 vs 同系列次一级 | 2-3 |
| Apple | 同品类全线 + "Currently viewing" | 2-4 |
| Beats | 无内置对比表 | — |
| Bose | 同品类 2-3 款 + 行分组 | 2-3 |
| Sony | 品类页三列对比，仅关键差异 | 3 |
| Chinese Tech | 自家产品线横向对比 | 4-6 |

---

## 7. 输出规范

- 单个 `.html` 文件，CSS 内联在 `<style>` 中
- 文件命名：`[ProductName]-[Style]-[PageType].html`，如 `OpenMeet2-Shokz-Listing.html`
- 图片用描述性占位符：`[Image: lifestyle shot — person wearing headset at desk]`
- 价格如未确认写 `$XXX.XX`，数据如未确认写 `XX` 并标注 `[awaiting confirmation]`

---

## 8. 参考文件索引

### Shokz（原始文件，无前缀）

| 文件 | 内容 | 何时读 |
|------|------|--------|
| [design-tokens.md](references/design-tokens.md) | 颜色/字体/间距 CSS 变量 | Step 3 写 CSS |
| [component-library.md](references/component-library.md) | 12 个 HTML+CSS 组件 | Step 3 拼装组件 |
| [copy-patterns.md](references/copy-patterns.md) | headline/正文/FAQ 文案规范 | Step 3 + Step 5 |
| [page-structures.md](references/page-structures.md) | 两类页面 section 模板 | Step 3 确认结构 |
| [product-page-skeleton.html](assets/product-page-skeleton.html) | 产品详情页骨架 | Step 3 起手 |
| [listing-page-skeleton.html](assets/listing-page-skeleton.html) | 购买页骨架 | Step 3 起手 |

### Apple

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [apple-design-tokens.md](references/apple-design-tokens.md) | 颜色/字体/间距（白底+深色交替，SF Pro 系统字体） |
| [apple-components.md](references/apple-components.md) | Hero / 深浅段 / 横滑 shelf / 对比表等组件 |
| [apple-copy-patterns.md](references/apple-copy-patterns.md) | 双关标题 / 三层定位句 / CTA 小写规范 |
| [apple-page-structures.md](references/apple-page-structures.md) | 单品营销页 + 购买页结构模板 |
| [apple-marketing-skeleton.html](assets/apple-marketing-skeleton.html) | 营销页骨架 |
| [apple-buy-skeleton.html](assets/apple-buy-skeleton.html) | 购买页骨架 |

### Beats

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [beats-design-tokens.md](references/beats-design-tokens.md) | 深色主导配色 / 粗体字重系统 |
| [beats-components.md](references/beats-components.md) | 购买区 / 数据大字报 / 视频 Tab / 引用卡片 |
| [beats-copy-patterns.md](references/beats-copy-patterns.md) | 反差对比句 / 口语化语气 / 数据锚点 |
| [beats-page-structures.md](references/beats-page-structures.md) | 合体页结构（购买头 + 营销体） |
| [beats-product-page-skeleton.html](assets/beats-product-page-skeleton.html) | 合体页骨架 |

### Bose

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [bose-design-tokens.md](references/bose-design-tokens.md) | 极简黑白灰 / 几何无衬线体 |
| [bose-components.md](references/bose-components.md) | Feature Pills / Sticky Cart / 叙事长卷 / BoseCare |
| [bose-copy-patterns.md](references/bose-copy-patterns.md) | 感官第二人称 / 效果优先 / 温暖技术语言 |
| [bose-page-structures.md](references/bose-page-structures.md) | 三明治结构（购买→叙事→购买） |
| [bose-product-page-skeleton.html](assets/bose-product-page-skeleton.html) | 合体页骨架 |

### Sony

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [sony-design-tokens.md](references/sony-design-tokens.md) | 80%+ 深色 / SST 字体回退栈 |
| [sony-components.md](references/sony-components.md) | Feature Badges / 媒体引用 / 工程师证言 / 三层叙事 |
| [sony-copy-patterns.md](references/sony-copy-patterns.md) | 短句宣言对 / 技术三层叙事 / 媒体评价格式 |
| [sony-page-structures.md](references/sony-page-structures.md) | 营销页 + 购买页分离结构 |
| [sony-marketing-skeleton.html](assets/sony-marketing-skeleton.html) | 营销页骨架 |
| [sony-buy-skeleton.html](assets/sony-buy-skeleton.html) | 购买页骨架 |

### Chinese Tech

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [chinese-tech-design-tokens.md](references/chinese-tech-design-tokens.md) | 全暗沉浸 / 巨型数字字号 / 全屏 section |
| [chinese-tech-components.md](references/chinese-tech-components.md) | 巨型 Callout / 对比条 / 版本徽章 / 认证栏 |
| [chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md](references/chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md) | 工程叙事 / 版本号命名 / 前代对比 / 密集脚注 |

content.text:
SKILL.md is complete and lint-free. Three subagents are running in parallel:

1. **Sony style** — creating 4 reference files + 2 HTML skeletons
2. **Chinese Tech style** — creating 4 reference files + 1 HTML skeleton
3. **Excel merge** — adding competitive copy insights to Apple/Beats/Bose copy-patterns

I'll wait for them to complete. The current progress:

- Shokz: original files unchanged (as required)
- Apple: 4 reference files exist, 2 skeletons renamed to match spec
- Beats: 4 reference files + 1 skeleton exist
- Bose: 4 reference files + 1 skeleton exist
- Sony: being created now (subagent 1)
- Chinese Tech: being created now (subagent 2)
- SKILL.md: rewritten with 6-style selection, 266 lines (under 500 limit)
- Excel insights: being merged now (subagent 3)
